overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from a third-person action game showing a character exploring a misty canyon with bioluminescent water at night. The character moves through rocky terrain with glowing blue pools and rivers, transitioning from a stationary observation point to running along a riverside path.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a misty canyon at night with bioluminescent blue water glowing in a rocky pool. The character stands on the right side observing the environment before moving out of frame, leaving the camera focused on the glowing pool and surrounding cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon with flowing bioluminescent river

events.description: camera passes close by central rock formation in the water

large rock outcrop rising from the center of the glowing water

tall rock walls of the canyon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow canyon following a bioluminescent river. A prominent rock formation rises from the glowing water as the camera passes by it. Mist continues to hover over the water between the canyon walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside dirt path alongside calm water

events.description: character reappears running along the riverside path

agents.ego_description: character with bow on back runs along the dirt path next to the water, moving away from camera

grass-covered slope rising from the path
faint lights visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a riverside dirt path where the character reappears running forward. The water here is dark without the blue glow, and grassy hillsides replace the rocky canyon walls. The character runs along the path with a bow visible on their back.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty, bioluminescent canyon that gradually opens into a dark, grassy riverside landscape. It begins with a view of a glowing blue pool nestled among rocky cliffs, where a character stands observing the environment before moving out of frame. As the camera pushes forward, it glides through a narrow canyon following a bioluminescent river, passing a prominent rock formation rising from the glowing water beneath a layer of hovering mist. The scene then shifts from the rocky walls to a riverside dirt path, where the blue glow fades into dark water and the terrain transforms into grassy hillsides. Finally, the character reappears with a bow on their back, running forward along the path as the environment fully opens up.
